hero.label: Made for Hyperbound
hero.headline: I want to help Hyperbound build enterprise pipeline from scratch.
hero.subheadline: Hyperbound is creating a category that feels both timely and practical by turning top rep behavior into AI roleplays that improve execution inside real deals. I am excited by the chance to join as an Enterprise BDR because this role sits at the intersection of outbound, sales performance, and a product that is easy to believe in.

whyCompany.title: Hyperbound turns sales insight into repeatable frontline execution
whyCompany.body: What stands out to me is that Hyperbound is not just another coaching tool. It analyzes real sales calls, identifies behaviors tied to closed won outcomes, and turns them into realistic AI buyer roleplays that help teams actually improve.

whyCompany.title: Early category creation makes this a high-leverage sales moment
whyCompany.body: As a YC S23 company with a growing team and multiple open roles, Hyperbound feels like it is entering an important scale phase. Joining now means helping define how enterprise buyers understand Revenue Activation and building pipeline while the category is still being shaped.

whyCompany.title: My BDR foundation fits a build-from-scratch sales environment
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked in cold outreach, HubSpot, and LinkedIn sequences and helped acquire 15 to 20 paying clients, so I understand the discipline behind creating pipeline early. My recent internship at NextAfter also sharpened how I think about messaging, testing, and communicating value in B2B environments.

quote: I want this role because Hyperbound solves a real sales problem in a way that feels measurable, modern, and easy to get behind. I would be proud to start conversations for a product that helps teams practice better and perform better.
